hero.description:
I leverage over five years of Quality Assurance (QA) experience with global tech giants like AWS, Netflix, and Apple, combining this expertise with Lean Six Sigma methodologies.
I now architect secure, fault-tolerant, and production-ready backend systems within the .NET ecosystem.

about.title: Engineering Perspective
about.p1: My experience in localization and quality assurance for flagship products of prestigious brands has consistently reinforced a critical lesson: A single bug or process vulnerability can impact millions of users and severely damage brand reputation.
about.p2: Today, I apply that same meticulous precision and discipline to writing clean, maintainable, and secure code. I do not merely write syntax; I engineer robust systems that prioritize scalability and reliability.
about.p3: I consolidate my computer science and software engineering foundations through rigorous programs such as Harvard CS50, a B.A. in Management Information Systems at Istanbul University, and premium certified training, enabling me to architect enterprise-grade solutions using C# and .NET Core.
about.p4: My Goal: To integrate my multidimensional perspective on quality, security, and architecture into a forward-thinking engineering team.
about.focus_backend: Backend & Architecture: Designing scalable systems using N-Tier architecture, RESTful APIs, and SOLID principles with C# and .NET Core.
about.focus_security: Data & Security: Ensuring data integrity with MSSQL, PostgreSQL, and Entity Framework Core; proactively mitigating CSRF/XSS vulnerabilities through OWASP Secure Coding principles.
about.focus_quality: Process & Quality: As a Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt certified developer, I execute process-driven development aimed at reducing technical debt and achieving operational excellence.

projects.title: Projects
projects.p1_desc: An enterprise-grade Content Management System developed in an N-Tier architecture using C# and .NET Core, featuring Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and secure file management. It is protected against CSRF, XSS, and other vulnerabilities through strict defensive programming practices.

experience.title: Professional Foundation
experience.job1_list:
• Architecting and designing secure, scalable backend solutions (RESTful APIs, Microservices) within the .NET ecosystem.
  • Developing enterprise data access layers utilizing N-Tier architecture and Entity Framework Core.
  • Integrating vulnerability mitigation and security practices aligned with OWASP standards.
experience.job2_list:
• Managed In-Context Review (ICR) and Quality Assurance (QA) processes for Netflix and Apple software interfaces.
  • Ensured technical terminology consistency for cloud architecture and cybersecurity software, primarily for Amazon Web Services (AWS).
  • Authored the "Netflix Studio Localization Style Guide" and implemented process optimizations (Lean Six Sigma).

contact.title: What's Next?
contact.text: I am currently open to Backend, .NET Developer, and Full Stack positions, with a particular interest in the Fintech and E-commerce sectors. I am ready to contribute my multidimensional perspective on quality, security, and architecture to your team.
